calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Lisa L. Kohli, via Zoom, Esq., for Amy V. Meaney, Personal Representative.

John DiAna, Esq., via Zoom, for Wanda Seavey, Creditor.

Glenda Valuroso, via Zoom, Interested Party in propria persona.

At the court's query, Mr. DiAna reports as to his client's position and Ms. Kohli reports that it doesn't appear that Glenda Valuroso is objecting to the instant petition. Ms. Valuroso reports her position to the court and confirms that she does not object to the instant petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-11-2023 Off Calendar

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar May-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2023 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-30-2023 Continued To Mar-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom: Christopher A. DeWys, Esq. for Amy Valuroso Meaney (Administrator). John "Jack" DiAna, Esq. for Wanda Seavey (Creditor).

Mr. DeWys stated that he was a bit optimistic at the last hearing about the time needed to file a petition, that there have been some communication issues, that he is hopeful that the matter will wrap up soon, and requested a 60-day continuance. The Court inquired about the real property still being in the estate. Mr. DeWys stated that the real property is still in the estate in the name of the decedent, that there was a pre-death contract to sell the property, and that he is looking at the math to make sure that everything was paid in full.

At the conclusion of comments, the status on close of the estate is continued to March 27, 2023, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. The Court stated that it will expect a petition for final distributiion or a petition for continued status of administration on file before that date.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: Singh. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-25-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Christopher DeWys, via Zoom, for Amy Valuroso Meaney, Personal Representative.

The court points counsel to the pending accounting and queries counsel regarding whether his client anticipates getting waivers of accounting. Counsel reports that he is working on clearing the Examiner's notes and is gathering information hoping to file a petition for final distribution within ninety (9) days. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to grant a continuance of the Administration and is taking the matter under submission. The court advises that it is likely to include a status hearing on the filing of an accounting petition, in the proposed order.

The matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Ronald E. Quidachay. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Oct-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Aug-15-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-27-2022 Continued To Aug-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Closing Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-11-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Chris Dewys, via ZOOM, counsel for Amy Meaney, Petitioner.

The court at the outset aks if anyone is appearing to object to the petition. There being no objections, Amy Valuroso Meaney is appointed administrator with full IAEA authority. Bond will be fixed at $450,000 and a status hearing on close of estate is set for APR-11-2022.

This matter was taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. Not Reported.
